E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

ITM P2 V2.4

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 747
Recv ID: 767
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 58
Func Name: Navigation

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "AP9",
    "soft": "0703",
    "version": "0102"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 39424,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "GPS antenna open circuit"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39425,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "GPS disturbed communication"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39430,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {

    },
    "name": "Front display error"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39431,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Flash ROM error of control unit"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39432,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Gyro open circuit"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49542,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {

    },
    "name": "Audio unit connection problem"
  },

    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CD changer connection problem"
  },
  {

  },
  {

    "name": "MM CAN controller problem"
  },
  {

    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "DVD-ROM disc error"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39437,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "DVD-ROM drive error"
  },
  {

    },
    "name": "Main keyboard connection problem"
  },

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "GPS RTC internal electronic abnormality"
  },
  {

  },
  {

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "GPS ROM internal electronic abnormality"
  },
  {

    "name": "Antitheft lock"

  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "7B61",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3B61FFFFFFFFFF",
    "name": "Ecr System configuration",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds",
      "engineering",
      "supplier"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
